skills.name: requirement-studio-ui
skills.summary: Provides the interactive workspace for natural-language discovery, source review, requirements, assumptions, conflicts, scope, and baselines.

skills.name: architecture-review-ui
skills.summary: Provides interactive architecture diagrams, ADRs, tradeoffs, risks, threats, deployment, and approval views.

skills.name: project-preview-and-diff-ui
skills.summary: Provides repository tree, generated-file preview, ownership, symbol trace, semantic diff, and regeneration review.

skills.name: build-run-console-ui
skills.summary: Provides live and historical build, test, startup, smoke, repair, and environment evidence views.

skills.name: artifact-evidence-explorer
skills.summary: Provides searchable lineage and evidence navigation across requirements, code, tests, builds, security, deployments, and releases.

skills.name: collaborative-comment-approval
skills.summary: Provides reusable comments, mentions, assignments, decisions, approvals, exceptions, and notification workflows.

skills.name: tenant-policy-and-quota
skills.summary: Provides tenant administration for policy, capabilities, models, registries, runners, budgets, retention, and quotas.

skills.name: generation-usage-metering
skills.summary: Meters model, tool, runner, storage, network, artifact, and support usage by tenant, project, run, and feature.

skills.name: support-diagnostic-bundle
skills.summary: Creates privacy-safe diagnostic packages for failed or degraded synthesis runs.

skills.name: feedback-to-skill-learning-loop
skills.summary: Converts user feedback, defects, review findings, support cases, and evaluation failures into governed Skill improvements.
